text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do a double take at Agnes Tachyon's
uncharacteristic concentration.
choice_data_list: Rare to see you so serious about this.
Rare to see you so serious about this.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. Today I am conducting a so-called
verification test.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
The results of this test will form the groundwork
for future experiments. Thus, it is imperative that
my preparation be impeccable.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
...Waaait, what do you mean "rare"? I'm always
serious when the occasion requires so!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Whether that's true or not, it's certain that Agnes
Tachyon normally doesn't behave like this before
a race.
